---
title: "test_uplink.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_uplink.py"
loc: 80
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.57
style_score: 3.56
intel_score: 7.40
overall_score: 4.42
---

## Intent
The `test_uplink.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on make_api_error, mock_spinner, wrapper, mock_spinner_impl, _force_sdk_available, test_uplink_token_flood_truncation, test_uplink_api_severance_retry, test_uplink_fatal_exhaustion. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via make_api_error, mock_spinner, wrapper, mock_spinner_impl, _force_sdk_available, test_uplink_token_flood_truncation, test_uplink_api_severance_retry, test_uplink_fatal_exhaustion. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [types](file://types)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [google.genai.errors](file://google.genai.errors)

### Exports
- `make_api_error`
- `mock_spinner`
- `wrapper`
- `mock_spinner_impl`
- `_force_sdk_available`
- `test_uplink_token_flood_truncation`
- `test_uplink_api_severance_retry`
- `test_uplink_fatal_exhaustion`
